requires.rationale: ≥3 ownership types — multi-owner-by-role rather than single owner field

structure.description: Owners surfaced as a typed list grouped by role (Technical / Business / Steward / Producer / Consumer). Each role can have N owners; same person can hold multiple roles. Per-role assign and remove controls.

rationale.hypothesis: A flat 'owner' field forces a fiction: real ownership is multi-faceted (who built it ≠ who is accountable for it ≠ who consumes it). Typed roles let each axis route notifications and policies independently.

evidence.description: Ownership grouped by Technical Owner / Business Owner / Steward / Producer / Consumer

counterexample.description: Solo-author entities don't need typed roles
